topic: volatile acidity and vinegar or solvent aromas
trigger_keywords: defecto se asocia con el término acidez volátil elevada
defecto puede provocar la sensación de picor desagradable y acidez avinagrada

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Acetic acid bacteria or other microorganisms produce excessive volatile acids and related compounds in a susceptible wine.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Acetic acid contributes a sharp vinegar character, while ethyl acetate can add solvent-like or nail-polish aromas.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The wine can show an unpleasant volatile lift, vinegary acidity, and solvent-like aromas.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Excess volatile acidity can produce sharp vinegar and solvent-like characters that mask fruit and reduce wine quality.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
